title: 「Everything / Anything / Something」句型
formula: Something / Anything / Everything + singular verb + other information

formulas.formula: Something / Anything / Everything + singular verb + other information
Subject + verb + something / anything / everything + other information

example: Something feels wrong when a system rewards speed more than accuracy.
exampleZh: 當一個制度重速度多於準確時，總會有點不對勁。

examples.en: Something feels wrong when a system rewards speed more than accuracy.
examples.zh: 當一個制度重速度多於準確時，總會有點不對勁。

meaning.zh: Something 表示某件未具體說明的事物；anything 表示任何事物或沒有限制；everything 表示相關範圍內的一切。

rules.en: Treat all three pronouns as singular.
rules.zh: Something、anything 和 everything 在文法上都視為單數。

rules.en: Use something for an unspecified thing that exists.
rules.zh: Something 表示某件不確定但存在的事物，最常見於肯定句。

rules.en: Use anything in questions, negatives, conditions or for unrestricted choice.
rules.zh: Anything 常見於問句、否定句、條件句，亦可表示「任何都可以」。

rules.en: Use everything for all things in the relevant range.
rules.zh: Everything 表示相關範圍內的一切，通常寫成一個字。

rules.en: Put an adjective after the pronoun.
rules.zh: 形容詞放在代名詞後面。

rules.en: Use that to add a describing clause in this lesson.
rules.zh: 本課使用 that 子句描述這些代名詞。
examples: Something that he said surprised me.

rules.zh: 否定句不要使用雙重否定。
examples: I do not know anything about the problem.

benefits.en: It helps you discuss things that are unknown.
benefits.zh: 當你知道事情存在但不知道具體是甚麼時，可以使用 something。

benefits.en: It shows how wide your meaning is.
benefits.zh: 三個詞能清楚區分某件、任何或所有事情。

benefits.en: It avoids long lists and repeated nouns.
benefits.zh: 它能避免逐一列出所有物件、文件或細節。

benefits.en: It lets you add useful descriptions naturally.
benefits.zh: 代名詞後可自然加入形容詞或 that 子句。

benefits.en: It helps you make clear general statements.
benefits.zh: 它適合討論規則、安全、信任和規劃等概括性議題。

en: Rewrite each sentence using something, anything or everything.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 something、anything 或 everything 改寫以下句子。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: An unknown object in the kitchen is making a strange noise.
questions.promptZh: 廚房裏有一件不明物件正在發出奇怪的聲音。
questions.answer: Something is making a strange noise in the kitchen.
questions.answerZh: 廚房裏有東西正在發出奇怪的聲音。
questions.highlight: Something is making a strange noise in the kitchen.

questions.prompt: All the materials and arrangements are ready for the class.
questions.promptZh: 課堂所需的所有物資和安排都已準備好。
questions.answer: Everything is ready for the class.
questions.answerZh: 課堂所需的一切都已準備好。
questions.highlight: Everything is ready for the class.

questions.prompt: I cannot find a single item in this drawer.
questions.promptZh: 我在這個抽屜裏連一件東西也找不到。
questions.answer: I cannot find anything in this drawer.
questions.answerZh: 我在這個抽屜裏找不到任何東西。
questions.highlight: I cannot find anything in this drawer.

questions.prompt: One of the dishes in the oven smells wonderful, but I do not know which one.
questions.promptZh: 焗爐裏其中一道菜聞起來很香，但我不知道是哪一道。
questions.answer: Something smells wonderful in the oven.
questions.answerZh: 焗爐裏有些東西聞起來很香。
questions.highlight: Something smells wonderful in the oven.

questions.prompt: All aspects of the situation changed after the new manager arrived.
questions.promptZh: 新經理到任後，情況的各個方面都改變了。
questions.answer: Everything changed after the new manager arrived.
questions.answerZh: 新經理到任後，一切都改變了。
questions.highlight: Everything changed after the new manager arrived.

questions.prompt: Do you need any groceries or household items from the supermarket?
questions.promptZh: 你需要從超級市場買任何食品或家居用品嗎？
questions.answer: Do you need anything from the supermarket?
questions.answerZh: 你需要從超級市場買任何東西嗎？
questions.highlight: Do you need anything from the supermarket?

questions.prompt: An unidentified object is blocking the door.
questions.promptZh: 有一件不明物件擋住房門。
questions.answer: Something is blocking the door.
questions.answerZh: 有東西擋住房門。
questions.highlight: Something is blocking the door.

questions.prompt: She packed all the things she needed for the trip.
questions.promptZh: 她收拾了旅程所需的所有東西。
questions.answer: She packed everything she needed for the trip.
questions.answerZh: 她收拾了旅程所需的一切。
questions.highlight: She packed everything she needed for the trip.

questions.prompt: We did not hear a single sound during the night.
questions.promptZh: 我們在夜間連一點聲音也沒有聽到。
questions.answer: We did not hear anything during the night.
questions.answerZh: 我們在夜間甚麼也沒有聽到。
questions.highlight: We did not hear anything during the night.

questions.prompt: An unknown item fell from the shelf.
questions.promptZh: 有一件不明物品從架上掉下來。
questions.answer: Something fell from the shelf.
questions.answerZh: 有東西從架上掉下來。
questions.highlight: Something fell from the shelf.

questions.prompt: I would like a warm drink, but I do not mind which one.
questions.promptZh: 我想喝一杯暖飲，但哪一款都可以。
questions.answer: I would like something warm to drink.
questions.answerZh: 我想喝點暖的東西。
questions.highlight: I would like something warm to drink.

questions.prompt: All the important information is written on this page.
questions.promptZh: 所有重要資料都寫在這一頁上。
questions.answer: Everything important is written on this page.
questions.answerZh: 所有重要內容都寫在這一頁上。
questions.highlight: Everything important is written on this page.

questions.prompt: Does this report contain any useful information?
questions.promptZh: 這份報告有任何有用的資料嗎？
questions.answer: Is there anything useful in this report?
questions.answerZh: 這份報告裏有任何有用的內容嗎？
questions.highlight: Is there anything useful in this report?

questions.prompt: An unexpected event happened on the way home.
questions.promptZh: 回家途中發生了一件意想不到的事。
questions.answer: Something unexpected happened on the way home.
questions.answerZh: 回家途中發生了一件意想不到的事。
questions.highlight: Something unexpected happened on the way home.

questions.prompt: You may choose any suitable item from the menu.
questions.promptZh: 你可以從餐牌中選擇任何合適的菜式。
questions.answer: You may choose anything suitable from the menu.
questions.answerZh: 你可以從餐牌中選擇任何合適的菜式。
questions.highlight: You may choose anything suitable from the menu.

questions.prompt: All the necessary materials and arrangements have been prepared.
questions.promptZh: 所有必需的物資和安排都已準備好。
questions.answer: Everything necessary has been prepared.
questions.answerZh: 所有必需的東西都已準備好。
questions.highlight: Everything necessary has been prepared.

questions.prompt: I noticed an unusual object near the window.
questions.promptZh: 我留意到窗邊有一件不尋常的物件。
questions.answer: I noticed something unusual near the window.
questions.answerZh: 我留意到窗邊有些不尋常的東西。
questions.highlight: I noticed something unusual near the window.

questions.prompt: We could not find any affordable product in the shop.
questions.promptZh: 我們在店裏找不到任何價格合理的產品。
questions.answer: We could not find anything affordable in the shop.
questions.answerZh: 我們在店裏找不到任何價格合理的東西。
questions.highlight: We could not find anything affordable in the shop.

questions.prompt: All the valuable items were kept in the safe.
questions.promptZh: 所有貴重物品都存放在保險箱裏。
questions.answer: Everything valuable was kept in the safe.
questions.answerZh: 所有貴重的東西都存放在保險箱裏。
questions.highlight: Everything valuable was kept in the safe.

questions.prompt: She wants a simple meal for lunch, but she has not chosen one.
questions.promptZh: 她午餐想吃一頓簡單的飯，但尚未選好。
questions.answer: She wants something simple for lunch.
questions.answerZh: 她午餐想吃點簡單的東西。
questions.highlight: She wants something simple for lunch.

questions.prompt: One of the things that you said worried me.
questions.promptZh: 你說過的其中一件事令我擔心。
questions.answer: Something that you said worried me.
questions.answerZh: 你說過的某件事令我擔心。
questions.highlight: Something that you said worried me.

questions.prompt: All the points that the teacher explained were clear.
questions.promptZh: 老師解釋的所有要點都很清楚。
questions.answer: Everything that the teacher explained was clear.
questions.answerZh: 老師解釋的一切都很清楚。
questions.highlight: Everything that the teacher explained was clear.

questions.prompt: Any action that damages the equipment must be reported.
questions.promptZh: 任何損壞設備的行為都必須呈報。
questions.answer: Anything that damages the equipment must be reported.
questions.answerZh: 任何損壞設備的事情都必須呈報。
questions.highlight: Anything that damages the equipment must be reported.

questions.prompt: I will take any action that helps the team.
questions.promptZh: 任何有助團隊的行動，我都願意採取。
questions.answer: I will do anything that helps the team.
questions.answerZh: 任何有助團隊的事情，我都願意做。
questions.highlight: I will do anything that helps the team.

questions.prompt: An unidentified substance that looked like smoke was rising from the field.
questions.promptZh: 田野上有一種看似煙霧的不明物質正在升起。
questions.answer: Something that looked like smoke was rising from the field.
questions.answerZh: 有些看似煙霧的東西正從田野升起。
questions.highlight: Something that looked like smoke was rising from the field.

questions.prompt: All the items that we ordered arrived on time.
questions.promptZh: 我們訂購的所有物品都準時送達。
questions.answer: Everything that we ordered arrived on time.
questions.answerZh: 我們訂購的一切都準時送達。
questions.highlight: Everything that we ordered arrived on time.

questions.prompt: You should not share any file, form or message that contains personal information.
questions.promptZh: 你不應分享任何載有個人資料的檔案、表格或訊息。
questions.answer: You should not share anything that contains personal information.
questions.answerZh: 你不應分享任何載有個人資料的東西。
questions.highlight: You should not share anything that contains personal information.

questions.prompt: One of your belongings was left in the classroom.
questions.promptZh: 你有一件個人物品被遺留在課室裏。
questions.answer: Something that belongs to you was left in the classroom.
questions.answerZh: 有一件屬於你的東西被遺留在課室裏。
questions.highlight: Something that belongs to you was left in the classroom.

questions.prompt: Every action or design choice that reduces road safety should be examined carefully.
questions.promptZh: 任何降低道路安全的行動或設計選擇都應被仔細檢視。
questions.answer: Anything that reduces road safety should be examined carefully.
questions.answerZh: 任何降低道路安全的事情都應被仔細檢視。
questions.highlight: Anything that reduces road safety should be examined carefully.

questions.prompt: All the questions that the nurse asked me were easy to answer.
questions.promptZh: 護士問我的所有問題都很容易回答。
questions.answer: Everything that the nurse asked me was easy to answer.
questions.answerZh: 護士問我的一切都很容易回答。
questions.highlight: Everything that the nurse asked me was easy to answer.

questions.prompt: If there is any change, please call me immediately.
questions.promptZh: 如有任何變化，請立即致電給我。
questions.answer: If anything changes, please call me immediately.
questions.answerZh: 如有任何變化，請立即致電給我。
questions.highlight: If anything changes, please call me immediately.

questions.prompt: There must have been a problem with the booking system.
questions.promptZh: 預訂系統一定出了問題。
questions.answer: Something must have gone wrong with the booking system.
questions.answerZh: 預訂系統一定有些地方出了問題。
questions.highlight: Something must have gone wrong with the booking system.

questions.prompt: We should check all the equipment, signs and arrangements before the doors open.
questions.promptZh: 開門前，我們應檢查所有設備、標誌和安排。
questions.answer: We should check everything before the doors open.
questions.answerZh: 開門前，我們應檢查一切。
questions.highlight: We should check everything before the doors open.

questions.prompt: Do not sign a document of any kind unless you understand it.
questions.promptZh: 除非你明白內容，否則不要簽署任何類型的文件。
questions.answer: Do not sign anything unless you understand it.
questions.answerZh: 除非你明白內容，否則不要簽署任何東西。
questions.highlight: Do not sign anything unless you understand it.

questions.prompt: An action needs to be taken regarding the broken lift.
questions.promptZh: 需要就故障升降機採取行動。
questions.answer: Something needs to be done about the broken lift.
questions.answerZh: 需要就故障升降機採取一些行動。
questions.highlight: Something needs to be done about the broken lift.

questions.prompt: The storm damaged every item in the garden.
questions.promptZh: 暴風雨損壞了花園裏的每件物品。
questions.answer: The storm damaged everything in the garden.
questions.answerZh: 暴風雨損壞了花園裏的一切。
questions.highlight: The storm damaged everything in the garden.

questions.prompt: You can ask me any question about the course.
questions.promptZh: 你可以問我任何有關課程的問題。
questions.answer: You can ask me anything about the course.
questions.answerZh: 你可以問我任何有關課程的事情。
questions.highlight: You can ask me anything about the course.

questions.prompt: All tasks and decisions seem more difficult when you are tired.
questions.promptZh: 疲倦時，所有任務和決定似乎都會變得更困難。
questions.answer: Everything seems more difficult when you are tired.
questions.answerZh: 疲倦時，一切似乎都會變得更困難。
questions.highlight: Everything seems more difficult when you are tired.

questions.prompt: There is an important fact you should know before the meeting.
questions.promptZh: 會議前，有一項重要事實是你應該知道的。
questions.answer: There is something important that you should know before the meeting.
questions.answerZh: 會議前，有一件重要的事情是你應該知道的。
questions.highlight: There is something important that you should know before the meeting.

questions.prompt: I could not take any action to stop the leak.
questions.promptZh: 我無法採取任何行動阻止漏水。
questions.answer: I could not do anything to stop the leak.
questions.answerZh: 我無法做任何事情阻止漏水。
questions.highlight: I could not do anything to stop the leak.

questions.prompt: It feels as though there is a problem when a system rewards speed more than accuracy.
questions.promptZh: 當一個制度重速度多於準確時，感覺就像存在某個問題。
questions.answer: Something feels wrong when a system rewards speed more than accuracy.
questions.answerZh: 當一個制度重速度多於準確時，總會有點不對勁。
questions.highlight: Something feels wrong when a system rewards speed more than accuracy.

questions.prompt: Any policy or action that weakens public trust should be examined carefully.
questions.promptZh: 任何削弱公眾信任的政策或行動都應被仔細檢視。
questions.answer: Anything that weakens public trust should be examined carefully.
questions.answerZh: 任何削弱公眾信任的事情都應被仔細檢視。
questions.highlight: Anything that weakens public trust should be examined carefully.

questions.prompt: All parts of the work become more expensive when planning is poor.
questions.promptZh: 規劃做得不好時，工作的所有部分都會變得更昂貴。
questions.answer: Everything involved in the work becomes more expensive when planning is poor.
questions.answerZh: 規劃做得不好時，工作所涉及的一切都會變得更昂貴。
questions.highlight: Everything involved in the work becomes more expensive when planning is poor.

questions.prompt: We should record all the points agreed during the meeting.
questions.promptZh: 我們應記錄會議期間議定的所有事項。
questions.answer: We should record everything that was agreed during the meeting.
questions.answerZh: 我們應記錄會議期間議定的一切。
questions.highlight: We should record everything that was agreed during the meeting.

questions.prompt: If you notice any object or problem that could cause an accident, report it at once.
questions.promptZh: 如果你發現任何可能引致意外的物件或問題，請立即呈報。
questions.answer: If you notice anything that could cause an accident, report it at once.
questions.answerZh: 如果你發現任何可能引致意外的事情，請立即呈報。
questions.highlight: If you notice anything that could cause an accident, report it at once.

questions.prompt: A piece of information may be missing from the final report.
questions.promptZh: 最終報告可能遺漏了一項資料。
questions.answer: Something may be missing from the final report.
questions.answerZh: 最終報告可能遺漏了一些東西。
questions.highlight: Something may be missing from the final report.

questions.prompt: The new system allows staff to find all the information and tools they need in one place.
questions.promptZh: 新系統讓員工可以在同一個地方找到所需的所有資料和工具。
questions.answer: The new system allows staff to find everything they need in one place.
questions.answerZh: 新系統讓員工可以在同一個地方找到所需的一切。
questions.highlight: The new system allows staff to find everything they need in one place.

questions.prompt: We should not promise any result or service that we cannot deliver.
questions.promptZh: 我們不應承諾任何無法提供的成果或服務。
questions.answer: We should not promise anything that we cannot deliver.
questions.answerZh: 我們不應承諾任何無法做到的事情。
questions.highlight: We should not promise anything that we cannot deliver.

questions.prompt: An object or action that appears harmless can still create a serious risk.
questions.promptZh: 一件看似無害的物件或行動仍可能造成嚴重風險。
questions.answer: Something that appears harmless can still create a serious risk.
questions.answerZh: 有些看似無害的事情仍可能造成嚴重風險。
questions.highlight: Something that appears harmless can still create a serious risk.

questions.prompt: All factors that affect public safety must be considered before the plan is approved.
questions.promptZh: 計劃獲批准前，所有影響公共安全的因素都必須被考慮。
questions.answer: Everything that affects public safety must be considered before the plan is approved.
questions.answerZh: 計劃獲批准前，所有影響公共安全的事情都必須被考慮。
questions.highlight: Everything that affects public safety must be considered before the plan is approved.
